label: 分块边界
description: 从分块列表中提取相邻分量之间的边界格，输出单张拓扑 grid。一个格被标为边界，当且仅当它自身或其 8-邻接格里出现 ≥2 个不同的分量编号。可用于把 BSP 分块还原为切分线（含十字路口角点）、或可视化拓扑切区的分块边界。
description-en: Extracts inter-partition boundary cells from a list of partition grids. A cell is marked as boundary iff itself or any of its 8-neighbors are covered by ≥2 different partitions. Useful for recovering BSP split lines (including cross-intersection corners) or visualizing topology-split borders.
icon: 深色背景上几个色块拼贴在一起，相邻色块之间高亮的细线表示边界，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: partition
inputs.label: 分块列表
inputs.description: 一组同形状 0/1 网格，每张代表一个分量。
inputs.description-en: List of same-shape 0/1 grids, one per partition cell.

outputs.name: topology
outputs.label: 边界拓扑
outputs.description: 0/1 边界拓扑 grid，与输入分量同形状。
outputs.description-en: 0/1 boundary topology grid, same shape as input partition cells.
